M-019.NAME: manual-client-cli
M-019.owns: operator-triggered manual client issuance, profile-consistent config export and QR/output handling over backend provisioning logic

exports.fn-create-internal-client: Backend CLI entry that provisions or reuses an internal client and exports a working config
exports.fn-export-manual-client-config: Writes config or QR output after backend provisioning succeeds using the same CLIENT_PROFILE as web provisioning

M-019.hotspot: H-007: Manual client issuance is unsafe if shell scripts bypass backend topology and config generation logic
H-017: Manual configs must not bypass backend profile and preshared-key rendering
